name: telegram-notify
description: Telegram notifications when Claude finishes a turn, with two-way reply: answer on Telegram (typed or tap a button) to wake the session with your next prompt. Stdlib Python, no dependencies.

bot_token.title: Telegram Bot Token
bot_token.description: Token from @BotFather. Stored in your OS keychain, never in settings.json.

chat_id.title: Chat ID (optional)
chat_id.description: Leave blank to auto-detect from the first message you send your bot.
